name: Protocol Omega - Hull Breach
triggerCondition: Detected hull breach or rapid depressurization in any station sector
steps: Sound station-wide hull breach alarm (Code Omega)
Seal all bulkhead doors in affected section automatically
Evacuate personnel from affected and adjacent sections
Deploy emergency pressure barriers and hull sealant drones
Activate backup life support for isolated sections
Dispatch damage control team in EVA suits to breach location
Confirm atmospheric integrity before re-opening sealed sections

name: Protocol Delta - Radiation Surge
triggerCondition: Radiation levels exceed safe threshold by 150% in any sector or reactor anomaly detected
steps: Trigger radiation surge alarm (Code Delta)
Automatically seal radiation-hardened bulkheads around affected zone
Evacuate all non-essential personnel to shielded safe zones
Deploy portable radiation shielding to adjacent sectors
Issue RadiShield compound to all personnel within exposure radius
Engineering team to identify and isolate radiation source
Medical team to begin exposure screening for affected crew
Monitor radiation levels continuously until below safe threshold for 30 minutes

name: Protocol Sigma - Fire Containment
triggerCondition: Confirmed fire detection in any station compartment
steps: Activate fire suppression system in affected compartment
Seal ventilation ducts to prevent smoke spread
Evacuate personnel from compartment and adjacent areas
Deploy fire response team with portable extinguishers
Monitor atmospheric composition for toxic gases
Restore ventilation only after fire is confirmed extinguished and air quality verified

name: Protocol Tau - Biological Containment
triggerCondition: Detection of unknown biological agent, pathogen release, or xenobiological contamination
steps: Activate biohazard alarm (Code Tau)
Engage full quarantine lockdown of affected section
Activate negative pressure ventilation in quarantine zone
Deploy decontamination teams in Level-4 biosafety suits
Identify biological agent through emergency lab analysis
Administer prophylactic treatments to exposed personnel
Maintain quarantine until three consecutive clear bioassays

name: Protocol Epsilon - Station Evacuation
triggerCondition: Catastrophic station failure imminent or multiple critical system failures
steps: Sound station-wide evacuation alarm (Code Epsilon)
All personnel report to designated evacuation assembly points
Activate all escape pods and emergency shuttle pre-flight sequences
Department heads conduct personnel headcount at assembly points
Priority boarding: medical patients, then civilians, then crew by deck order
Transmit distress beacon on all frequencies including deep-space relay
Command staff evacuate last after confirming all sections clear
Engage station autopilot for orbital stability if possible

name: Protocol Kappa - Intruder Alert
triggerCondition: Unauthorized access detected, hostile boarding, or unknown entity identified on station
steps: Activate intruder alert (Code Kappa)
Lock down all sensitive areas including armory, command bridge, and research labs
Security teams deploy to last known intruder location
Activate internal sensor sweep to track movement
Non-security personnel shelter in place in nearest secure compartment
Establish communication blackout on non-secure channels
Neutralize or contain threat before lifting lockdown
